name: evidence_matrix_final.json
how_it_solves: json.load at generation time; raw payload carried in attributes.raw.
why_it_exists: Deep pass: previous stream did not open these files. Downstream consumers can now walk the structure without a second read.

CRISPR_functional_genomics.test: Spearman co-dependency (MBD4 expr vs ATR/CHEK1/WEE1 CRISPR effect)
CRISPR_functional_genomics.root_cause: ATR/CHEK1/WEE1 are pan-essential (median effects -1.10, -1.81, -2.83); floor effect masks any MBD4-specific signal. MBD4 expression is a poor LOF proxy for a DNA repair gene. Only 12 cell lines have confirmed MBD4 damaging mutations — insufficient for mutation-stratified analysis.
CRISPR_functional_genomics.what_would_fill_it: Isogenic HAP1-MBD4-KO CRISPR viability screen (not in DepMap)

drug_sensitivity_PRISM.test: Spearman (MBD4 expr vs AUC) + Wilcoxon (MBD4-mut vs WT)
drug_sensitivity_PRISM.result: VE-822 r=0.024 p_adj=0.72 | MK-1775 r=0.027 p_adj=0.72 | All 7 compounds BH-adj p>0.71 | Mutation-stratified VE-822 p=0.39
drug_sensitivity_PRISM.root_cause: Same expression proxy limitation; mutation-stratified n=9-12 is severely underpowered. PRISM does not contain berzosertib or ceralasertib (only older ATRi: VE-822, ETP-46464, AZ20).
drug_sensitivity_PRISM.what_would_fill_it: ATRi dose-response in MBD4-KO organoids or isogenic cell lines

transcriptomic_RS_signature.test: Wilcoxon (MBD4-low vs MBD4-high tertile RS score) + Spearman
transcriptomic_RS_signature.result: Wilcoxon p=0.016 (MBD4-low RS > MBD4-high) | Spearman r=-0.11 p=0.058
transcriptomic_RS_signature.verdict: DIRECTIONAL but not confirmed positive — Wilcoxon significant, Spearman borderline. Expression proxy limitation. No deep deletions of MBD4 in TCGA-OV (0/585 in pan-cancer OV cohort).
transcriptomic_RS_signature.root_cause: MBD4-LOF is not a feature of HGSOC/OV. The RS signal in OV is driven by CCNE1/TP53/MYC, not MBD4. Berzosertib HGSOC trial (Konstantinopoulos 2020) confirms this — MBD4 not mentioned.
transcriptomic_RS_signature.what_would_fill_it: RS signature analysis in UCEC (highest MBD4-LOF at 1.70%) with confirmed MBD4-LOF samples (n=9 — still underpowered)

pan_cancer_epidemiology.test: MBD4-LOF frequency across 30 TCGA PanCancer Atlas 2018 cohorts
pan_cancer_epidemiology.verdict: DESCRIPTIVE — confirms MBD4-LOF is rare across TCGA. UCEC is the highest-frequency cancer type. Absolute numbers too small to power any stratified analysis.
pan_cancer_epidemiology.note: Previous session reported 4.9% (26/529) for UCEC — this was fabricated. Real figure is 1.70% (9/529), verified against individual mutation records.

clinical_ATRi_WEE1i.test: Literature mining: PATRIOT (ceralasertib), berzosertib HGSOC trial, NETc paper
clinical_ATRi_WEE1i.result: MBD4 = 0 mentions in PATRIOT full text (67 patients, 173-gene panel). MBD4 not in PATRIOT sequencing panel (Supp Table 3). MBD4 = 0 mentions in berzosertib HGSOC trial abstract. NETc paper: MBD4-signature in 34% of NETc, but ATRi (elimusertib) activity attributed to ERBB2/PI3K/ATR pathway, NOT MBD4 deficiency.
clinical_ATRi_WEE1i.verdict: MISSING — no clinical trial has tested ATRi/WEE1i in MBD4-LOF patients. No responder in any published ATRi trial is annotated as MBD4-LOF.
clinical_ATRi_WEE1i.what_would_fill_it: PATRIOT subgroup analysis by MBD4 status (requires data access) or prospective ATRi trial with MBD4-LOF enrichment

alternative_signal_ICI.result: Johansson 2019: prolonged SD in uveal melanoma with germline MBD4 nonsense mutation on pembrolizumab+ipilimumab. Rodrigues 2018 (Nat Commun): outlier anti-PD1 response in uveal melanoma with germline MBD4 mutations in hypermutated tumors. NETc (PMC11046577): MBD4-signature → high TMB → ICI sensitivity hypothesis.
alternative_signal_ICI.verdict: MBD4-LOF → ICI sensitivity (via hypermutation/TMB) has case-level support. This is a DIFFERENT therapeutic axis from ATR/WEE1. Not relevant to the ATR/WEE1 evidence package.

overall_verdict.justification: All 5 computational modalities return NULL or MISSING. The one marginal signal (TCGA-OV RS score Wilcoxon p=0.016) uses expression as a proxy and does not survive Spearman correlation. MBD4-LOF is too rare in all public datasets (0.19% pan-cancer, 1.02% in DepMap) to power any statistical test. No published clinical trial has tested ATRi/WEE1i in MBD4-LOF patients.
overall_verdict.fundamental_limitation: MBD4 is a DNA repair gene — its LOF cannot be reliably proxied by expression level. The correct experimental model (isogenic MBD4-KO) is not represented in any public dataset.
path_to_upgrade: HAP1-MBD4-KO isogenic ATRi/WEE1i IC50 assay (ceralasertib + berzosertib vs parental)
γH2AX + pCHK1 western blot at baseline in HAP1-MBD4-KO (RS marker confirmation)
MBD4-KO organoid ATRi dose-response (patient-derived, UCEC preferred)
PATRIOT data access request to query MBD4 status in responders
Prospective UCEC trial with MBD4-LOF enrichment arm
